ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cloud_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cloud provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the cloud provider (e.g., AWS, Azure) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cloud provider */,
  "endpoint_url" TEXT /* Endpoint URL for the cloud provider */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the cloud provider */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the cloud provider was added */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the cloud provider was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cloud_connections" (
  "connection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cloud connection */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cloud provider */,
  "access_key" TEXT /* Access key for the cloud connection */,
  "secret_key" TEXT /* Secret key for the cloud connection */,
  "security_token" TEXT /* Security token for the cloud connection (if applicable) */,
  "connection_name" TEXT /* Name of the cloud connection */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cloud connection */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the cloud connection was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the cloud connection was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("connection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cloud_connections_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES cloud_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cloud_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cloud profile */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cloud provider */,
  "profile_name" TEXT /* Name of the cloud profile */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cloud profile */,
  "credentials" TEXT /* Credentials for the cloud profile (e.g., access key, secret key) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the cloud profile was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the cloud profile was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cloud_profiles_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES cloud_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "connection_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cloud connection */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., instance, volume) */,
  "resource_id" TEXT /* ID of the resource */,
  "data" TEXT /* Inventory data for the resource */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the inventory entry was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the inventory entry was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the inventory entry (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_connection_id FOREIGN KEY ("connection_id") REFERENCES cloud_connections ("connection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer, power user) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was last updated */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date when the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "connection_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cloud connection */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the connection or inventory */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write) */,
  "resource_id" TEXT /* ID of the resource accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_connection_id FOREIGN KEY ("connection_id") REFERENCES cloud_connections ("connection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cache" (
  "cache_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cache entry */,
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the inventory entry */,
  "data" TEXT /* Cached data for the inventory entry */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the cache entry expires */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the cache entry was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the cache entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cache_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cache_inventory_id FOREIGN KEY ("inventory_id") REFERENCES inventory ("inventory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit event */,
  "connection_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cloud connection */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change occurred */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "resource_id" TEXT /* ID of the resource changed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_connection_id FOREIGN KEY ("connection_id") REFERENCES cloud_connections ("connection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "connection_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cloud connection */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., usage, cost, performance) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "data" TEXT /* Report data */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_connection_id FOREIGN KEY ("connection_id") REFERENCES cloud_connections ("connection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "backups" (
  "backup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backup */,
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the inventory entry */,
  "data" TEXT /* Backup data for the inventory entry */,
  "backup_date" TEXT /* Date when the backup was created */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the backup was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the backup was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("backup_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backups_inventory_id FOREIGN KEY ("inventory_id") REFERENCES inventory ("inventory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
